description_long: This is a bolt-action sniper rifle with a long, slender barrel and a robust, textured stock finished in a muted, camouflage-inspired color scheme. The stock appears to be ergonomically designed, featuring a raised cheek rest and a thick rubberized buttpad for recoil absorption. A large telescopic scope is mounted on the top rail, indicating the rifle is intended for precision shooting at long distances. The magazine is a detachable box type, positioned just in front of the trigger guard. The barrel is free-floating and extends well beyond the fore-end, maximizing accuracy. The overall construction suggests a combination of metal and polymer materials, with visible screws and mounting points for accessories.
description: A bolt-action sniper rifle with a long barrel, ergonomic stock, and mounted telescopic scope, finished in muted camouflage tones. Features include a detachable box magazine and a robust, precision-oriented design.
description_view_0: Side view showing the full length of the rifle, highlighting the long barrel, scope, and textured stock.
description_view_1: Front view emphasizing the circular muzzle, scope lens, and the width of the stock and barrel.
description_view_2: Opposite side view displaying the rifle's profile, including the scope, bolt, and magazine placement.
description_view_3: Rear angled view focusing on the buttpad, cheek rest, and the alignment of the scope with the barrel.
